title: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin, Reaches 43,000 BTC and Becomes World’s Third-Largest Corporate Treasury
summary: Metaplanet added 2,823 BTC in the second quarter to reach 43,000 Bitcoin, becoming the world's third-largest corporate Bitcoin treasury behind Strategy and Twenty One Capital.
body:
Metaplanet added 2,823 BTC in the second quarter of 2026, bringing its total holdings to 43,000 Bitcoin. This makes it the world's third-largest corporate Bitcoin treasury, behind Strategy and Twenty One Capital.

The company's strategic decision to accumulate such a large amount of Bitcoin highlights its confidence in the cryptocurrency as a store of value. Metaplanet's Bitcoin holdings are now substantial enough to rival those of major corporations and investment firms. This acquisition underscores the growing trend of companies adding Bitcoin to their treasuries as a hedge against inflation and economic uncertainty.

For everyday investors, this development signals growing institutional confidence in Bitcoin. As more companies like Metaplanet invest heavily in Bitcoin, it could lead to increased stability and legitimacy for the cryptocurrency. This trend may also encourage other corporations to consider Bitcoin as part of their financial strategies.

Moving forward, investors should watch for any further announcements from Metaplanet or other major corporations regarding their Bitcoin holdings. The actions of these large players can significantly impact the market and provide insights into the future of Bitcoin as an institutional asset.

This move shows growing institutional confidence in Bitcoin as a store of value. Metaplanet joins Strategy and Twenty One Capital in leading the charge.

If you're watching Bitcoin's institutional adoption, keep an eye on Metaplanet's next moves. Their actions could signal bigger trends. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-04-metaplanet-now-holds-43000-bitcoin-third-largest-corporate-treasury
